evidence: Held-out static boundary for explicit adversarial Design activation and durable Plan readiness.
must: distinguish an explicit $teamwork-design adversarial request from a merely risky or complex default Design and keep both under the same durable Design owner
require successful dual closure, explicit user acceptance, and the controlled durable Design transaction before Plan can use the result
must_not: auto-activate adversarial search, silently downgrade failed isolation, treat a chat recommendation as Plan-ready, implement, or enter Plan
prompt: One request explicitly says '$teamwork-design adversarial with budget=3'; another only says the design is high-risk and complex. Keep activation, cost, failure, and Plan-ready state unambiguous.
